channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oil at 22-month high as Qatar minister warns prices could reach $150
item.description: Oil futures traded at their highest levels since the summer of 2024 on Friday as the war against Iran entered a seventh day with no sign of it ending ...

item.title: Energy and metals have been hot but a rally for agriculture commodities may now be getting under way, says technical analyst
item.description: An agriculture rally seems to be kicking into gear, says Fundstrat’s Mark Newton.

item.title: ‘My mother refuses to turn on the heat’: Will America’s war with Iran really push up our utility bills?
item.description: “She is reading alarmist headlines about Iran in the newspapers.”

item.title: Trump professes no concern for rise in gasoline prices that have jumped over the last week
item.description: President Donald Trump often talks about gasoline prices — but now that they’re increasing, he says he is not concerned.

item.title: The ‘everybody loses’ scenario: Why the Iran conflict is breaking this classic portfolio strategy
item.description: Shifting correlations are a problem for investors. says Morgan Stanley.

item.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The Dow Industrials fell about 785 points Thursday as oil prices surged amid the U.S.-Iran war. The 30-stock index is on track for its worst week sinc...

item.title: Some banks raised CD yields last month. Where you can still snag 4%
item.description: The rates give savers another opportunity to lock in sweet yields in the event the Federal Reserve resumes its rate cuts.

item.title: U.S. crude oil tops $80 per barrel as escalating Iran war disrupts global fuel supplies
item.description: Oil prices have surged about 20% this week as the U.S.-Iran war engulfs the Middle East.

item.title: Anthropic is showing astronomical growth. There's a Mag 7 stock to ride the AI company's success
item.description: Anthropic growth has a positive readthrough for this stock, Bank of America said.

item.title: This software stock has been on a wild ride. Where it's going next, according to the charts
item.description: Jay Woods of Freedom Capital Markets breaks down the technicals on this software name.

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...
